# Gemini Omni Rights Receipt MCP

Paid remote MCP for Gemini Omni commercial rights receipt MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://geminiomnirights.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://geminiomnirights.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://geminiomnirights.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/gemini-omni-rights-receipt-mcp

Use case: Gemini Omni commercial rights receipt MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_video_rights, issue_rights_receipt, flag_missing_disclosure, summarize_asset_sources, export_client_receipts
